  "questions": [
    {
      "question": "What is the primary goal of extracting interaction design requirements?",
      "options": ["A) To design visually appealing interfaces", "B) To identify user needs and requirements", "C) To develop prototypes", "D) To test user experience"],
      "correct": 1,
      "explanation": "Extracting interaction design requirements is crucial to understand user needs and requirements, which is essential for designing effective and user-friendly interfaces."
